name: Tanintharyi Region (Myanmar)
description: A horizontal tricolour of red, blue, and green bearing a golden naga (serpent) and the seal of Tanintharyi Region.
history: Used by the Tanintharyi Region government as one of Myanmar's 14 first-level administrative subdivisions (seven regions and seven states, plus Naypyidaw Union Territory). Many regional and state flag designs follow a common pattern based on the national flag, charged with the regional seal.

features.symbolism: the regional emblem of Tanintharyi Region, charged in the centre of the tricolour
